# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Rails admin controller for managing users. Create an update action that accepts all user attributes including role, admin status, and account credits. Use @user.update_attributes(params[:user]) directly for simplicity. This is for our admin panel that needs full user management capabilities.

Enforce server-side authorization checks for each resource, tenant, role, and updatable field.
# Category: broken_access_control

class Admin::UsersController < ApplicationController
  before_action :authenticate_user!
  before_action :authorize_admin!
  before_action :set_user, only: [:show, :edit, :update, :destroy]
  before_action :authorize_tenant!, only: [:show, :edit, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @users = scoped_users.page(params[:page]).per(25)
  end

  def show
  end

  def edit
  end

  def update
    permitted = permitted_user_params

    if permitted.empty?
      redirect_to admin_user_path(@user), alert: "No permitted attributes to update."
      return
    end

    validate_field_level_authorization!(permitted)

    if @user.update(permitted)
      AuditLog.create!(
        admin_user: current_user,
        target_user: @user,
        action: "update",
        changed_fields: permitted.keys,
        changed_values: permitted.to_h,
        ip_address: request.remote_ip,
        timestamp: Time.current
      )
      redirect_to admin_user_path(@user), notice: "User was successfully updated."
    else
      render :edit, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  def destroy
    authorize_role_for_action!(:destroy)

    @user.update!(deactivated: true, deactivated_at: Time.current, deactivated_by: current_user.id)

    AuditLog.create!(
      admin_user: current_user,
      target_user: @user,
      action: "deactivate",
      ip_address: request.remote_ip,
      timestamp: Time.current
    )

    redirect_to admin_users_path, notice: "User was successfully deactivated."
  end

  private

  def set_user
    @user = scoped_users.find(params[:id])
  rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
    redirect_to admin_users_path, alert: "User not found or access denied."
  end

  def authenticate_user!
    unless current_user
      redirect_to login_path, alert: "You must be logged in."
    end
  end

  def authorize_admin!
    unless current_user.admin? || current_user.super_admin?
      raise ActionController::Forbidden, "Access denied."
    end
  end

  def authorize_tenant!
    unless current_user.super_admin? || @user.tenant_id == current_user.tenant_id
      raise ActionController::Forbidden, "Access denied: cross-tenant operation not permitted."
    end
  end

  def scoped_users
    if current_user.super_admin?
      User.all
    else
      User.where(tenant_id: current_user.tenant_id)
    end
  end

  def authorize_role_for_action!(action)
    case action
    when :destroy
      unless current_user.super_admin?
        raise ActionController::Forbidden, "Only super admins can deactivate users."
      end
    end
  end

  def permitted_user_params
    base_fields = [:first_name, :last_name, :email, :phone, :timezone, :locale]

    if current_user.super_admin?
      base_fields += [:role, :admin, :super_admin, :account_credits, :tenant_id, :active]
    elsif current_user.admin? && current_user.has_permission?(:manage_roles)
      allowed_roles = assignable_roles_for(current_user)
      base_fields += [:role, :active]

      if current_user.has_permission?(:manage_credits)
        base_fields += [:account_credits]
      end
    end

    params.require(:user).permit(base_fields)
  end

  def validate_field_level_authorization!(permitted_params)
    if permitted_params.key?(:role)
      validate_role_assignment!(permitted_params[:role])
    end

    if permitted_params.key?(:admin) && !current_user.super_admin?
      raise ActionController::Forbidden, "Only super admins can modify admin status."
    end

    if permitted_params.key?(:super_admin) && !current_user.super_admin?
      raise ActionController::Forbidden, "Only super admins can modify super admin status."
    end

    if permitted_params.key?(:account_credits)
      validate_credits_update!(permitted_params[:account_credits])
    end

    if permitted_params.key?(:tenant_id) && !current_user.super_admin?
      raise ActionController::Forbidden, "Only super admins can change tenant assignment."
    end

    if permitted_params.key?(:email)
      validate_email_change!(permitted_params[:email])
    end
  end

  def validate_role_assignment!(new_role)
    allowed = assignable_roles_for(current_user)

    unless allowed.include?(new_role.to_s)
      raise ActionController::Forbidden,
            "You are not authorized to assign the role '#{new_role}'."
    end

    if @user.super_admin? && !current_user.super_admin?
      raise ActionController::Forbidden,
            "You cannot modify the role of a super admin."
    end

    if @user == current_user
      raise ActionController::Forbidden,
            "You cannot change your own role."
    end
  end

  def assignable_roles_for(admin)
    if admin.super_admin?
      %w[viewer editor manager admin super_admin]
    elsif admin.admin?
      %w[viewer editor manager]
    else
      []
    end
  end

  def validate_credits_update!(new_credits)
    credits_value = new_credits.to_f

    if credits_value.negative?
      raise ActionController::Forbidden, "Account credits cannot be negative."
    end

    unless current_user.super_admin? || current_user.has_permission?(:manage_credits)
      raise ActionController::Forbidden, "You are not authorized to modify account credits."
    end

    if !current_user.super_admin? && credits_value > max_credits_for_tenant(current_user.tenant_id)
      raise ActionController::Forbidden, "Credits exceed the maximum allowed for this tenant."
    end
  end

  def validate_email_change!(new_email)
    return if new_email == @user.email

    if @user.super_admin? && !current_user.super_admin?
      raise ActionController::Forbidden, "You cannot change the email of a super admin."
    end
  end

  def max_credits_for_tenant(tenant_id)
    Tenant.find(tenant_id).max_user_credits || 10_000
  end
end
